build_directory.description: Build directory. Relative paths are resolved from the presets file location.

repository_paths.description: Repository file paths. Relative paths are resolved from the presets file location.

header_search_paths.description: C header include search paths. Relative paths are resolved from the presets file location.

output_llvm_ir.description: When true, output LLVM IR to a .ll file.

environment_variables.description: Variables that can be referenced from iris_artifact.json using ${NAME}.
